HonorHealth Scottsdale Osborn
prices.

📍 Phoenix, AZ HonorHealth 3/5 CMS rating

Cash-pay and insurance prices for 42 procedures at HonorHealth Scottsdale Osborn, pulled from the federally-mandated machine-readable file the hospital is required to publish. Cash-pay range across these procedures: $10 to $6,000.

CMS quality rating.

3/5 stars on CMS Hospital Care Compare. Based on ~50 measures of safety, mortality, readmission, patient experience, and timeliness. View on Care Compare ↗

Patient experience.

CMS HCAHPS patient survey, period ending 03/31/2025 · 438 completed surveys.

Measure This hospital Network avg Δ
HCAHPS overall star rating 3/5 2.8/5 +0.2
Would definitely recommend 74% 69.6% +4pp
Hospital rating 9 or 10 of 10 73% 68.6% +4pp
Nurses always communicated well 79% 75.6% +3pp
Doctors always communicated well 76% 76.6% -1pp
Given clear info about recovery 84% 84.4% 0pp
Room and bathroom always clean 63% 68.6% -6pp
Staff always explained meds 60% 57.6% +2pp
Quiet at night, always 51% 52.2% -1pp

About this data.

The prices above are pulled directly from HonorHealth Scottsdale Osborn's machine-readable file (MRF), required under the Hospital Price Transparency Rule (45 CFR 180.50). We download the file, parse the rows for our shoppable CPT set, and publish the dollar amounts as the hospital published them. No surveys, no estimates.

Cash-pay rates are what an uninsured patient would be charged. Insurance-negotiated rates vary by payer and plan; pick a payer in the comparison tool to see plan-specific numbers.

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
